description: Tenured change adoption: assignment, refusal chat, completion, underground workaround, peer trainer.

examples.context: State parks style desk: new online permit step. Two 20-year clerks push back on every meeting.
examples.resolution: Paid read time plus report assigned to all veterans. Deadline two weeks.

examples.context: Senior clerk refuses assignment at first. Supervisor 1:1 explains engagement is required.
examples.resolution: Agreed next day. Report submitted on time. Later thanked supervisor for structure.

examples.context: Veteran report names three real form gaps. Team presentation 1:1.
examples.resolution: Form fixes shipped. Veteran trains two shifts. Adoption improves.

examples.context: Small print shop moves from paper job bag to shared board. Estimator with 15 years resists.
examples.resolution: Report reveals fear of losing status as memory keeper. Board tweaked with legacy fields.

examples.context: Report done but veteran still uses private spreadsheet parallel to system
examples.resolution: Second 1:1. Spreadsheet retired or role adjusted.

examples.context: Will not read, will not report after documented chats
examples.resolution: HR path per handbook. Not a wrong-seat case.

examples.context: Staff energetic but confused on new software. Hired two years ago.
examples.resolution: Route training onboarding, not mf-tpl-058. See mf-tpl-002.
No old workaround observed. Veterans on new flow.
